text.title: Helm Advanced Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `Helm Advanced Patterns` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: decompose-chart
step.action: Identify reusable helpers; extract to a library chart.
step.output: Library chart skeleton + application chart refactor.

step.name: wire-hooks
step.action: Define hooks with explicit hook-weight; one hook per Job.

step.name: harden
step.action: Add checksum annotations, required-values guards, resource-policy keep where needed.

step.name: validate-and-test
step.output: Validator exit 0 + green ct + test job pass.
